name: Yuletide Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream butter with brown sugar, brandy flavoring, and corn syrup until light.
3. Add egg and beat until well combined.
4. Coat the diced candied fruit with 1 tablespoon of flour; set aside.
5. Sift together remaining flour, pumpkin pie spice, baking powder, and salt.
6. Stir dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
7. Add the coated fruit, chocolate chips, pecans, almonds, and currants.
8. Chill dough for 1 hour.
9. Drop heaping teaspoons of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
10. Place a cherry piece on top of each cookie.
11. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
12. Cool on a wire rack.
13. Store in covered containers for several days to allow them to soften and age.
Makes 4-1/2 dozen cookies.
